items.title: Manchester United Appoints Michael Carrick After Champions League Qualification
items.summary: Manchester United have officially confirmed the permanent appointment of interim head coach Michael Carrick on a two-year contract keeping him at Old Trafford until 2028.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Football Daily
items.summary: How will Manchester City cope after Pep leaves & will it be Spurs or West Ham going down?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Cummins on Malinga and Sakib: 'A captain's dream'
items.summary: The SRH captain was full of praise for the fast-bowling duo, and said he had "learned a lot off those guys"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
